name: Return of Perishable Seized Property Under Bond

eligibility.description: Applies to owners of property seized under sections 7301 or 7302 that is liable to perish, decrease greatly in value, or is too expensive to keep.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can prevent the total loss or forced low-value sale of seized perishable goods by posting a bond equal to the appraised value to have the property returned.
